name: Hamentachen Filling# 3 Povidla
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the prunes and remove the pits.
2. Pour boiling water over the raisins and let them stand until plump. Drain the raisins.
3. Combine the prunes, drained raisins, nuts, and half of the peeled orange in a food processor (FP).
4. Add sugar to the mixture.
5. Process the ingredients using the medium blade of a food chopper or mill.
This recipe is from Love and Knishes by Sara Kasdan. My grandmother used to chop this mixture in a large wooden bowl with a hand-held single-bladed food chopper, without any fancy gadgets ().
